text:
RT @learn2vibe: Huge Updates to Codex for knowledge work..
Here's how you can learn 95% of Codex in 29 minutes.
https://t.co/hXg17MgOop

AI has made remote work a death sentence for startups 

Get everyone under the same roof ASAP

人类又开始大型幻觉了
V4 写作都比 Opus 好了
大家开心就好哈
节日快乐

This is the entire AI skills gap in one sentence.

The people getting the best output from AI aren’t writing better prompts. 

They understand the problem better before they start prompting.

Same model. Same subscription. 

Wildly different results. 

The only variable is
Share your art. Connect and support other creators.
